one_sentence: One core judgment principle that changes how the agent evaluates situations.
full_statement: A testable, domain-specific principle. It must be specific enough that two experts would agree on when it applies.
why: Explain what the agent would get wrong without this axiom, and what it gets right with it.
applies_when: When the task involves evaluating the named situation type
does_not_apply_when: When the task is purely mechanical or factual lookup
failure_risk: Without this axiom, the agent applies a generic assumption and reaches the wrong qualitative conclusion.
